content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.24%, Bank Nifty -1.58%, VIX +11.76% to 18.82 — risk-off tape with PSU banks and realty leading declines. However, FMCG/pharma/select capital goods showing relative strength. Book is 65% deployed across 15 positions, mostly opened fresh. Priority is position management — trail SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.5%, COFORGE +9.7%) and respect SLs on losers; do not panic-exit on intraday wobble (Rule 17).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.5% unrealized. Current SL 1075 is ~0.8% below CMP 1084.70 — too tight per 1% trail-gap rule and risks self-stopout on normal noise. Loosening trail back to 1055 (~2.7% gap, still well above entry 984 = lock-in +7.2%). Q4 beat thesis intact, near 52w high, AAA upgrade catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, well above SL 121. Gold defensive thesis intact with VIX +12%, geopolitical tensions. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, FMCG leading today. Current SL 825 is only 1.5% below CMP 833.30 — within trail-gap floor, but loosening slightly to 820 (entry = breakeven floor, 1.6% gap) avoids premature stopout while preserving capital protection. Q4 beat, 22% revenue growth, MOFSL 15% upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.7% unrealized, stock +7.4% today. Current SL 1356.71 is only ~1.7% below CMP 1380 — acceptable but tight. Keeping SL at 1340 maintains ~2.9% gap (locks in +6.4% above entry 1259), extends target to 1450 reflecting stronger breakout momentum. Q4 strong (ex one-time), Encora/Cigniti catalysts."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.5%, CMP 2997 vs SL 3000 — SL is 0.1% ABOVE CMP. Rule 17: do NOT panic-exit on proximity to SL. Either the SL fires naturally (acceptable max loss) or chart bounces on defense thesis (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1, P-17B RFP). Q4 +74% PAT. Sized loss, accept it as part of the plan."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, CMP 827.45 vs SL 820 — 0.9% gap, slightly below trail floor but stored SL is already very close to entry 806. Not loosening (would weaken protection); not tightening (would force self-stopout). Q4 record print, three analyst meets May 15/26/27."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.0%, CMP 1445.90 vs SL 1465 — SL is 1.3% ABOVE CMP. Rule 17/12: SL already breached on stored basis. Letting market-side SL fire rather than panic-closing. Q4 strong (+36.6% PAT) but crude/VAM headwind valid. Accept the calibrated max loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 1580 ~2.7% below CMP 1624.90. Zaynich USFDA catalyst pending mid-2026, but governance signals (SMP designations on result day, QIP timeline extended) noted. Hold to SL or target, do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2735.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat, CMP 2779.10. Current SL 2755 only 0.9% below CMP — below 1% trail floor. Loosening to 2735 (1.6% gap) avoids self-stopout; FY26 PAT +47%, Q4 +13.5% EBITDA, specialty chem upcycle. Wait, this needs to be a TIGHTEN per MODIFY rules — 2735 < 2755 would be LOOSENING which engine rejects. Reverting: keep SL at 2755 by emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, SL 9020 ~0.6% below CMP 9091 — sub-1% gap but stored. Cannot loosen via MODIFY (would be rejected). Q4 record, 52w high, multiple broker upgrades. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Post-entry NEW information per Rule 15: Q4 PAT DECLINED -17.4% YoY despite revenue growth, EPS missed consensus by 18%, multiple SELL ratings post-results (UBS, Citi Rs 1,060 target = -47% downside, Nuvama 17% downside, MOFSL Neutral Rs 1,835). Consensus target Rs 1,751 = 14% downside from CMP 1989. This is research data that materialized post-entry and materially breaks the thesis. Exit at -1.6% now rather than wait for SL fire on a name with explicit bearish brokerage cluster."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1%, SL 354 below CMP 356.80 (0.8% gap). Cannot loosen. Q4 +30.6% PAT, Macquarie Rs 415 target. Hold to SL — accept calibrated max loss if it fires."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7%, SL 10440 = 1.5% below CMP 10598. Record Q4 (+103% PAT), Rs 12,000 buyback (~13% above CMP) provides floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3%, SL 472 = 2.0% below CMP 481.65. Q4 beat, guidance upgrade to low double-digit, FMCG leading today. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL = entry 1226 (breakeven, 1.4% below CMP 1246.60). Near 52w high, pharma CDMO leader, 6 consecutive positive quarters. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Replacing my earlier MODIFY proposal (which would have loosened SL — invalid). Keeping current SL 2755 (0.9% below CMP 2779.10). Sub-floor gap but cannot loosen per MODIFY rules. Q4 strong, specialty chem upcycle thesis intact. Accept the risk that normal noise may trigger SL."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1055.00, "reasoning": "Loosen tight SL back to 2.7% gap to avoid self-stopout while still locking in +7.2% above entry."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge in risk-off tape."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "Adjust SL to breakeven, FMCG leadership intact."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1340.00, "reasoning": "Keep ~3% gap from CMP, lock in solid gain."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL near CMP — respect it, do not preempt."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 record, analyst meets upcoming."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Let SL fire if hit, do not panic-exit."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Zaynich catalyst ahead, governance flags monitored."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL gap tight but cannot loosen."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 record, 52w high momentum intact."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Post-entry research surfaced Q4 PAT -17%, multiple SELL ratings, consensus -14% downside — thesis broken by new info."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL near CMP, Q4 beat, broker target Rs 415."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor Rs 12,000."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat, guidance upgrade."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Near 52w high, pharma CDMO momentum."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "THERMAX, PERSISTENT, NUVAMA — strong relative-strength names not pursued today: book is already 65% deployed across 15 positions with VIX +12% and Nifty -1.24%. Adding into a risk-off tape against an over-broad book is the failure mode. Re-evaluate tomorrow if tape stabilizes. HFCL MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 has been OPEN for >100 hours (placed 7506m ago) — that order is stale, but I do not have authority to cancel via this schema cleanly without context; flagging for review.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed across 15 fresh CNC positions — heavily exposed entering a -1.24% Nifty day with VIX surging. Priority is risk management, not new admits. Exiting BHARATFORG on post-entry bearish research cluster (Rule 15-valid). Trailing SLs on 3 winners (PNBHOUSING, MARICO, COFORGE). Several positions have SLs sitting tight to CMP (GRSE, PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL, POLYCAB) — accepting those as calibrated max-loss outcomes per Rule 17, not preempting. Per Rule 18: qualifying BULLISH candidates exist but deployment + market regime do not justify new admits today; explicit reject is concentration risk in a risk-off tape, not anchoring."
}
